topic: Research the architecture and v1 contract for the standalone local AI document diff skill

focus: Broad survey of existing document diff ecosystem
Broad survey of existing document diff tools, libraries, and products
noveltyJustification: First pass; five substantive findings about the existing landscape with direct evidence from primary sources. Gap analysis establishes no existing tool fills the standalone document diff niche.
keyQuestions: What existing maintained libraries and products exist for document diff/compare?
answeredQuestions: Q6: What existing maintained libraries and products exist for document diff/compare?

ruledOut.approach: Automerge-style CRDT merging as diff foundation
ruledOut.reason: Designed for distributed merging, not local comparison; adds unnecessary complexity

focus: Canonical representation and extraction pipelines per format
noveltyJustification: The Markdown-as-hub approach, two-pass extraction model, and format capability tier classification are all new to this packet.
keyQuestions: Which canonical representation and extraction pipeline best preserve semantic structure across formats?
answeredQuestions: Q1: Which canonical representation and extraction pipeline best preserve semantic structure across formats?

ruledOut.approach: Direct format-to-format comparison without canonical intermediate
ruledOut.reason: Combinatorial N×M adapter explosion; hub-and-spoke model is sustainable
ruledOut.evidence: Iteration analysis of N format pairs

focus: Diff algorithm comparison for structural document comparison
noveltyJustification: Hybrid diff strategy, noise suppression rules, and move detection deferral are novel contributions extending known difftastic patterns.
keyQuestions: Which diff algorithm strategy best combines readable changes, structural awareness, and noise suppression?
answeredQuestions: Q2: Which diff algorithm strategy best combines readable changes, structural awareness, and noise suppression?

ruledOut.approach: Pure line-based diff (Myers/patience/histogram) for structured documents
ruledOut.reason: Line-oriented diffing misses structural changes, produces false positives on text reflow, and cannot distinguish semantic from formatting changes

noveltyJustification: Snapshot lifecycle design, identity/storage model, atomicity guarantees, and retention policy are novel synthesis.
keyQuestions: Which automatic snapshot lifecycle is safe, atomic, recoverable, and intentionally smaller than VCS?
answeredQuestions: Q3: Which automatic snapshot lifecycle is safe, atomic, recoverable, and intentionally smaller than VCS?

focus: HTML report architecture and security boundary
noveltyJustification: Self-contained HTML architecture, CSP-based security contract, fidelity warning system, and dual-view mode design are fresh contributions.
keyQuestions: Which local HTML report architecture is accessible, secure, self-contained, and honest about fidelity?
answeredQuestions: Q4: Which local HTML report architecture is accessible, secure, self-contained, and honest about fidelity?

noveltyJustification: Runtime decision synthesis, portable core vs skill wrapper architecture, offline/privacy properties, and skill workflow integration.
keyQuestions: Which runtime, portable interface, dependency set, and standalone-skill workflow best suit v1?
answeredQuestions: Q5: Which runtime, portable interface, dependency set, and standalone-skill workflow best suit v1?

focus: Security constraints for untrusted document input
noveltyJustification: Layered defense model, format-specific threat vectors, DOMPurify integration, XML bomb protection, and encrypted document handling are novel security synthesis.
keyQuestions: What security constraints apply to handling untrusted DOCX, HTML, and PDF input?
answeredQuestions: Q7: What security constraints apply to handling untrusted DOCX, HTML, and PDF input?

focus: Architecture shape comparison and eliminated alternatives
noveltyJustification: Formal comparison of three architecture shapes with eliminated alternatives record documented with evidence.
keyQuestions: Compare at least three architecture shapes and record eliminated alternatives

ruledOut.reason: Cannot support automatic snapshot lifecycle or CLI/skill integration; browser storage is ephemeral
Excessive dependency weight for CLI-first use case; distribution complexity disproportionate to value
Lacks unified.js AST ecosystem; two-language complexity for HTML report generation
Minimal document processing ecosystem; mammoth not available; must bridge JS or Python
Violates core requirement of working without Git (REQ-003)

focus: Fixture corpus, acceptance criteria, and performance benchmarks
noveltyJustification: Fixture corpus structure, acceptance criteria matrix, and performance benchmarks are novel planning contributions.
keyQuestions: What fixture corpus and measurable acceptance criteria should gate v1?
answeredQuestions: Q8: What fixture corpus and measurable acceptance criteria should gate v1?

focus: Integration synthesis, risks, and later-phase recommendations
noveltyJustification: Consolidation iteration; later-phase decomposition map and handoff summary are novel; much content restates prior findings in synthesis service.
keyQuestions: All primary questions for final synthesis
